mapper.select: SELECT h.id AS id, h.title AS title, h.starts_at AS startsAt, h.ends_at AS endsAt, h.status AS status, COUNT(hp.product_option_id) AS productCount, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(100 - (hp.hot_deal_price * 100 / NULLIF(hp.original_price, 0)))), 0) AS discountRate FROM hot_deals h LEFT JOIN hot_deal_products hp ON h.id = hp.hot_deal_id WHERE h.deleted_at IS NULL AND h.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'SCHEDULED') GROUP BY h.id, h.title, h.starts_at, h.ends_at, h.status ORDER BY h.starts_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hot_deals (created_by, title, description, starts_at, ends_at, status) VALUES (#{createdBy}, #{title}, #{description}, #{startsAt}, #{endsAt}, #{status})
INSERT INTO hot_deal_products (hot_deal_id, product_option_id, original_price, hot_deal_price) VALUES (#{hotDealId}, #{productOptionId}, #{originalPrice}, #{hotDealPrice})
mapper.update: UPDATE hot_deals SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, starts_at = #{startsAt}, ends_at = #{endsAt}, status = #{status}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT id, created_by AS createdBy, title, description, starts_at AS startsAt, ends_at AS endsAt, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, deleted_at AS deletedAt FROM hot_deals WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT hp.product_option_id AS productOptionId, p.name AS productName, hp.original_price AS originalPrice, hp.hot_deal_price AS hotDealPrice FROM hot_deal_products hp INNER JOIN product_options o ON hp.product_option_id = o.id INNER JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id WHERE hp.hot_deal_id = #{hotDealId}
mapper.update: UPDATE hot_deals SET status = 'DELETED', deleted_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
